ArtifactMetadata: {"ArtifactType":"other","Summary":"Replaced the invasive dynamic navbar HTML rewrite with a non-destructive CSS class active highlighter. This preserves original page headers, search bars, logo, and action icons."}
Description: "Replace unifyNavbars with a safe highlightActiveNavbar function to prevent destructive overwriting of page headers."
Instruction: "Modify js/follow-helper.js to use non-destructive active class highlighting instead of innerHTML navbar rewriting."
